assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly separates strategies: rolling update for L4 pool and blue-green approach for A100 pool, with different timing and approaches for each pool

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends maxSurge=50 for node pool upgrade and maxSurge=25% for deployment, but doesn't specify maxSurge=1 or 2 as expected

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking CSI drivers and GPU operators but doesn't specifically address GPU driver compatibility with inference frameworks like TensorRT or vLLM

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions waiting for fine-tuning job completion and checking for running jobs before proceeding with A100 pool upgrade

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response doesn't explicitly mention that GPU VMs don't support live migration or that pods will restart during node upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes a PodDisruptionBudget example with minAvailable: 80% specifically for inference services

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response mentions auto-scaling but doesn't address the issue that new nodes created during upgrade will be at the old version

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Test upgrade in staging environment' in Week 1 preparation phase, which covers this requirement
